subcodes.first_line: O thou sincere servant of the Ancient Beauty! In this moment thou art mentioned in the presence of 'Abdu'l-Bahá and in the gathering of the friends [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده صادق جمال قدم در ایندم در محضر عبدالبهاء مذکوری و در انجمن یاران
subcodes.subjects: @personal instructions, @obedience to and respect for government authority, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life
